acceptance_criteria.text: All 5 fixtures cover their stated topology + freshness scenario

proof.summary: FRESH: native topology, probe 200, full anthropic-ratelimit-unified-* headers (6 buckets)
UNAVAILABLE: native topology, probe 401 auth-rejected, no cache
FRESH: proxy topology (http://proxy.example.com:8321), probe 200, full headers
UNAVAILABLE: proxy topology, probe 502 upstream-5xx, no cache
UNAVAILABLE: empty _mock_topology (no auth), no probe, HOME overridden to tmpdir

acceptance_criteria.text: Each fixture pipes through node scripts/statusline.js, snapshot-compares stdout

proof.summary: 5 tests using spawnSync(node scripts/statusline.js), stdin=fixture JSON, ANSI-stripped semantic assertions. No byte-identity snapshots — avoids brittleness.

Logic trace verified manually: native-fresh→session:28%/week:7%; native-expired→[auth token rejected]; proxy-happy→session:45%/week:12%; proxy-5xx→[API unreachable]; no-config→[no API auth]. All match FR-8 enum literals in rate-limit-line.js HINT_MESSAGES.

acceptance_criteria.text: Mock contract doc explains the 3 new mock fields with examples

proof.summary: 30-line doc covering _mock_topology, _mock_probe_response, _mock_now_ms with table, legacy fields, add-fixture instructions, cache isolation explanation
No dependencies or devDependencies keys in package.json. Test runner uses node:test (builtin), child_process, fs, os, path — all Node builtins.

commands_for_verifier: node --test scripts/test/topology.test.js scripts/test/quota-parser.test.js scripts/test/creds.test.js scripts/test/quota-source.test.js scripts/test/rate-view.test.js scripts/test/format/rate-limit-line.test.js test/integration/fixtures.test.js

notes.aimux_degradation: aimux health check succeeded (CLIs available) but the agent/agents/workflow delegation surface was removed in Layer 5 purge. Only sessions, status, think, deepresearch remain. Self-executed as Medium tier (7 new/modified files, ~250 LOC, no novel patterns).
notes.statusline_change: Added CONTEXTBRICKS_CACHE_PATH env var support (1 line in HeaderProbeQuotaSource constructor + 1 comment line) for per-test cache isolation. No behavior change when env var unset.
notes.proxy_5xx_behavior: 502 with body 'unknown provider for model' correctly produces upstream-5xx hint, NOT no-model hint. isModelNotFound() returns false for any 5xx status — model-not-found chain only applies to 4xx. Documented in test comment.
notes.macos_keychain_protection: _mock_profile: {} added to all fixtures to short-circuit fetchUserProfile and prevent real macOS keychain/HTTP calls during integration tests.
